first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's strong full-stack and systems experience while pointing out the same key gap regarding enterprise-scale experimentation platforms. The minor differences in wording (e.g., "technical versatility" vs. "technical breadth", "feature flagging" vs. "feature-flighting") are synonymous and fall within the range of normal run-to-run linguistic variation, not representing a qualitative shift in assessment.
